text.title: Service Delivery SOP — Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the structure of an SOP document. Agent producing or auditing an SOP must satisfy this contract.

forbidden.pattern: any step missing one or more of: inputs / action / quality_gate / time_budget
decision text containing "use your judgment" / "it depends" / "see what makes sense" without an explicit branch table
quality gate stated as "make sure it works" / "looks good" without an evaluable check
SOP that references undocumented founder-only tools or credentials without an access plan
SOP versioned 1.0 with zero history of contractor executions (untested SOP)
step count < 5 (likely too coarse) or > 20 (likely needs sub-SOPs)

allowed-transformations.transformation: Group two short adjacent steps into one IF they share inputs and the combined step still has one gate.
Extract a recurring sub-routine into its own SOP and reference it as a step ("see SOP-007: GA4 install").
Mark a step as "optional, applies if <condition>" — allowed when condition is part of decision branching.

section.title: Self-check checklist (run before publishing SOP v1.0)

list.item: Every step has named inputs with source (r1)
Every "depends on..." moment is captured as an explicit branch (r2)
Every step has a concrete pass/fail gate (r3)
Every decision + gate has a named escalation owner + channel (r4)
Every step has a time budget; engagement total is calculable (r5)
SOP has been dry-run by the author end-to-end OR observed during a real execution
Tools, credentials, and templates referenced exist and are accessible to the target operator
